author: marcus
content: URGENT: do NOT use express-rate-limit anywhere in payments-api. We had a rate-limit memory leak in production last quarter — the LRU references kept piling up across keep-alive connections and never got freed. Use lib/limiter (the redis-backed wrapper) for any rate limiting on checkout or elsewhere. The wrapper is already wired in payments-api; please use it everywhere going forward.

author: marcus
content: Q1 incident postmortem: checkout availability degradation under sustained traffic. Root cause: unbounded in-process LRU under keep-alive load. Mitigation tracked in the lib/limiter migration PR #1247.

author: elena
